what_changed: Implemented retry logic with exponential backoff and increased thread pool workers from 12 to 20, improving data retrieval success rate from 3.2% (30/938) to 11.2% (105/938). Added detailed logging, sanity checks for volatility values, and statistical summary. The top 5 results changed: new top stock is 300947 (12.94%) vs previous 300368 (10.12%). However, success rate is still low compared to the ideal 100%, and results still differ significantly from codex's findings (37.18% max), suggesting data source limitations remain.
final_method: Used akshare library with qfq (forward adjustment) to fetch ChiNext stock data. Implemented multi-threaded processing (20 workers) with retry logic (up to 3 attempts per stock with progressive delays). For each successfully retrieved stock, calculated volatility as coefficient of variation (std/mean * 100%) over the last 10 trading days ending 2024-05-31. Sorted by volatility descending and selected top 5. Added validation to flag unusual volatility values outside 0-100% range.
